hero.activate-confirm: Set this as the active hero section for this language?
hero.bio:
I am an IT professional and writer working at the intersection of technology, society, and human values. With over five years of experience in software development, IT consulting, and digital strategy, I specialize in building practical, scalable, and user-focused digital solutions that address real-world challenges.

Professional Focus: Web Design & Development, Digital Strategy & Transformation, IT Consulting & System Optimization, Business Process Digitalization.

Alongside my technical work, I actively engage in writing on human rights, social issues, politics, and cultural identity. I also write poetry that reflects human emotions and lived experiences. I believe technology should not only solve problems but also contribute to a more aware, inclusive, and responsible society.
